description: Align the Orion Agent runtime with claw-code style platform boundaries while preserving the current web console experience.

userStories.title: Unify Execution Node Builder
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a single execution node builder so that runtime, frontend, and tests rely on one source of truth.
acceptanceCriteria: Only one primary execution node builder remains in the backend
TaskResponse continues to expose execution_nodes
Redundant dual-track execution node logic is removed or fully folded
Add or update unit tests for the single execution node path
Run the relevant backend unittest modules

userStories.title: Extract ContextBuilder
userStories.description: As a developer, I want context assembly extracted from AgentService so that context layers, budgets, and traceability can evolve independently.
acceptanceCriteria: Create a dedicated ContextBuilder module
runtime_agent delegates context layer construction to the builder
Existing context_layers output remains compatible
Add focused unit coverage for the new builder behavior
Run the relevant backend unittest modules

userStories.title: Introduce ExecutionRegistry
userStories.description: As a developer, I want key execution stages to be described by a registry so that execution metadata, recovery, and UI rendering share the same definitions.
acceptanceCriteria: Add an ExecutionRegistry module or equivalent registry abstraction
Critical execution stages expose metadata such as kind, title, and display-facing labels
The main runtime path uses the registry for at least the core execution stages
Frontend compatibility remains intact
Run backend tests and frontend build if types are touched

userStories.title: Extract RecoveryPolicy
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want failure recovery decisions extracted from the orchestrator so that retries, skip-step recovery, and replan behavior are easier to evolve safely.
acceptanceCriteria: Add a dedicated recovery policy module
Existing retry, skip failed step, and replan behaviors remain compatible
Add focused recovery policy tests
Do not break resume and recovery APIs
Run the relevant backend unittest modules

userStories.title: Prepare ToolPool and Citation Interfaces
userStories.description: As a platform maintainer, I want tool metadata and citation map interfaces standardized so that future permission and plugin work has a clean extension surface.
acceptanceCriteria: Tool metadata includes category, permission, and display-facing fields or a clear interface placeholder
Backend citation map has a documented and typed extension surface
Current task and answer flows do not regress
Update docs to describe the extension points
Run matching backend tests and frontend build if needed
